history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed after UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 due to removed Reactor APIs (doAfterSuccessOrError, reactor.retry.Retry), likely caused by jumping directly from SB 2.1 to 3.3.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 under JDK 11 before bumping to Java 17, allowing intermediate Reactor/Spring fixes to apply gradually, then proceed to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 under JDK 17 as recommended for high-regression-risk jumps.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed due to Reactor API changes (reactor.retry.Retry moved to reactor.util.retry.Retry) introduced by the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade step, which pulls in Reactor 3.4+.
history.qwen_rationale: Skipping the intermediate Spring Boot 2.7 step and proceeding directly to Spring Boot 3.3 under JDK 17 follows the recommended migration path for SB 2.x to 3.x. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe is transitive and handles the full dependency, namespace, and API transition in one step, avoiding partial Reactor upgrades that break compilation mid-chain.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to removed Reactor 3.4+ APIs (doAfterSuccessOrError) and namespace changes (reactor.retry.Retry vs reactor.util.retry.Retry).
history.qwen_rationale: The direct jump to Spring Boot 3.3 triggers Reactor 3.6+ which removes deprecated APIs. Following the recommended path, we replace upgrade_build_to_java17 with UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 under JDK 17, which internally composes necessary dependency and code migrations. The chain steps through plugin upgrades and Java version bumps sequentially to isolate failures and align with the empirical template for SB 2.x -> 3.x transitions.
